input: How do I cancel my subscription?
expected: Go to Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription, or contact support for assistance.

input: I lost all my project data!
expected: I'm connecting you with a human agent right now.
Support is available Monday through Friday, 9am to 6pm EST.

input: Do you offer a free trial?
expected: Yes, TaskFlow offers a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

input: Someone logged into my account without permission
expected: I'm connecting you with a human agent right now.
